creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 254560
devel/py-setuptools update to 74.1.3

Hi,

I've created a patch to update devel/py-setuptools to version 74.1.3 in the process of updating other stuff which requires a version < 75.x which is the reason why it is not the latest version.

Kind regards,

Jens
